title: Simulated: Alcubierre
description: Simulated: Alcubierre is a NeoForge addon for Create Simulated that adds a simple system of antigravity.
body: Alcubierre is an addon for Create and Sable that adds specialized blocks for building futuristic contraptions. The Antigravity Drive hooks into any kinetic network and cancels out gravity, letting your contraption float in place for as long as it stays powered. Crafting one takes a Glimmering Bottle. Get a glimmerinb bottle by filling an empty bottle below y=-40 in the End. The Alcubierre Controller is the captain's seat: put in coordinates and a dimension, then warp your whole ship there in a few seconds. Fire it from the panel or hook it up to redstone. ⚠️⚠️DISCLAIMER: AI WAS USED IN CODING THIS. ⚠️⚠️ All assets are human-made.
